nav.knowledge_base_hint: Stored experience, screening answers & documents for tailored applications

wizard.welcome_subtitle: AutoApply automates your job search by scanning platforms, matching opportunities to your profile, generating tailored resumes and cover letters, and applying on your behalf. Let's get you set up in a few quick steps.
wizard.welcome_cv_tip: Tip: on the Profile step you can upload your CV to auto-fill your information in seconds.
wizard.ai_not_configured: No AI provider — configure in Settings after setup
wizard.experience_subtitle: AutoApply reads your professional experiences from text files. Place your work history, projects, certifications, and skills into separate files in the experiences folder. The AI uses these to craft perfectly tailored resumes.
wizard.profile_subtitle: Basic information used across your applications.
wizard.preferences_subtitle: Tell us what you're looking for.
wizard.resume_subtitle: Upload a fallback resume for platforms that require a file. If an AI provider is configured, AutoApply generates tailored resumes automatically — this is only used as a backup.
wizard.login_subtitle: Log in to each platform to enable automated applications. This opens a real browser — log in normally, then close it.
wizard.done_subtitle: AutoApply is configured and ready to help you land your next role. Here's a summary:
wizard.app_answers_hint: Pre-fill answers for common screening questions on Workday, Ashby, and other portals.
wizard.upload_cta: Click to upload or drag & drop
wizard.job_titles_hint: Add each title you'd like to search for. The bot searches all of them.
wizard.locations_hint: Add cities or "Remote". The bot searches all locations.
wizard.keywords_include_hint: Jobs must mention these keywords to pass the filter.
wizard.keywords_exclude_hint: Jobs with these keywords are automatically skipped.
wizard.open_folder_alert:
Open this path in your file explorer:

~/.autoapply/profile/experiences/
wizard.resume_upload_aria: Upload resume file. Click or drag and drop. PDF or DOCX, max 5MB
wizard.platform_login_subtitle: AutoApply opens a browser window where you can log into your accounts. Your sessions are saved so you only need to do this once.
wizard.import_ai_ready: Upload your CV or import from LinkedIn to auto-fill the fields below.
wizard.import_ai_required: Configure an AI provider below to use auto-fill. You can still enter your profile manually.
wizard.import_applied_short: Profile fields updated. Review and edit anything below, then click Next.
wizard.resume_autofill_hint: If an AI provider is configured, uploading here also auto-fills your profile and job preferences.
wizard.resume_autofill: Reading your resume to fill profile fields…
wizard.resume_autofill_done: Profile and preferences updated from your resume.

settings.cover_letter_hint: Generate a tailored cover letter for each application. When off, no cover letter is attached.
settings.schedule_hint: Auto-start and stop the bot on a time schedule. The bot only runs during the configured window.
settings.ai_description: Configure an LLM API to generate tailored resumes and cover letters. Your API key is stored locally and never shared.
settings.login_description: Connect to LinkedIn before importing your profile. Open a browser to log into your job platforms — your session is saved for future use.
settings.schedule_description: Auto-start and stop the bot on a time schedule. When enabled, the bot runs only during the configured days and time window.
settings.answers_description: Pre-fill answers for common application questions (Workday, Ashby, etc.). These are used automatically when the bot encounters matching questions.
settings.updates_help: Check for new versions published on GitHub and install them without leaving the app.
settings.shortcuts_help: Create a Desktop icon and Start Menu entry so you can launch the app like any other program.

workflow.title: Step-by-step guide
workflow.subtitle: Follow these steps in order. You can go back anytime.
workflow.step1_desc: Log into LinkedIn and Indeed first, then fill in your details, upload your resume (PDF), and add experience files.
workflow.step2_desc: AI analyzes your profile and suggests roles, keywords, and improvements. No AI? Use the Claude Chrome extension prompt.
workflow.step3_desc: Apply analysis suggestions to your job search settings.
workflow.step4_desc: Expand networking: identify recruiters in your field and connection messages.
workflow.step5_desc: Learn from top professionals in your field and improve your LinkedIn.
workflow.step6_desc: Go to Dashboard, click Start, review each job, and click Approve & Apply. Max 15 per day.
workflow.step6_tip: Review mode is active: you approve each application before submitting.
workflow.analysis_error: Analysis failed. Check your AI settings or use the manual prompt.
workflow.manual_instructions: Copy this prompt, open LinkedIn in Chrome with the Claude extension, paste and run:

help.center_subtitle: FAQs, tips, and examples for using JobApply Assistant.
help.no_results: No results found. Try another word or category.
help.faq1_a: Open the **Guide** tab and follow the 6 steps in order. Start by filling your profile in Settings and uploading your resume PDF.
help.faq2_a: Not required. Without AI, the Guide provides prompts to copy into the Claude Chrome extension. With AI, job analysis and cover letters are automatic.
help.faq3_a: A step-by-step path: profile → job analysis → LinkedIn search → recruiters → reference profiles → daily applications. Progress is saved automatically.
help.faq4_q: How do I apply analysis suggestions?
help.faq4_a: In Guide step 3, click **Apply suggestions to search**. This fills titles, keywords, and locations in Settings → Search.
help.faq5_a: Before each application, you see the job and cover letter. Click **Approve & Apply** to submit, **Skip** to ignore, or **Edit** to adjust the letter.
help.faq6_a: Default limit is **15 per day** to avoid LinkedIn blocks. Adjust in Settings → Limits.
help.faq7_q: Where do I set profile and resume?
help.faq7_a: Go to **Settings → Profile** for name, email, and address. Upload the default resume PDF from the **Dashboard** or Settings.
help.faq8_q: What are the language settings for?
help.faq8_a: Three options: app language (UI), spoken languages (resume and forms), and job search languages (jobs in PT, EN, ES).
help.faq9_q: I live in Mexico — how do I configure search?
help.faq9_a: In Settings → Search, set **Mexico** as country and cities like **Ciudad de México** or **Remote**. Enable PT, EN, and ES in job search languages.
help.faq10_q: The bot asked for LinkedIn login — what do I do?
help.faq10_a: Open the browser, log in to LinkedIn manually, then click **I've logged in**. Do this once; the session is saved.
help.faq11_q: App won't open or says already running
help.faq11_a: Close other JobApply Assistant windows. If it persists, delete `.lock` in `C:\Users\YourName\.autoapply\` and reopen.
help.faq12_a: No. On macOS, the app uses Safari-compatible WebKit by default (even if Chrome is installed). Connect via Platform Login in Settings before importing from LinkedIn.
help.faq13_q: Should I keep the login browser open?
help.faq13_a: Yes — after logging in on LinkedIn or Indeed, keep the login browser open until the app shows **Connected**. Your session is saved so you only need to do this once per platform.
help.tour1_body: This is your home page. Follow the 6 steps in order — each prepares the next.
help.tour1_example: Step 1: fill profile. Step 6: apply from Dashboard.
help.tour2_body: Complete each item: profile, PDF resume, experience files, and languages.
help.tour2_example: E.g. upload your CV PDF and add a work_experience.txt file.
help.tour3_body: Check PT, EN, ES as you speak them. This improves search and fills LinkedIn forms.
help.tour3_example: Brazilian in Mexico: PT native, EN fluent, ES fluent.
help.tour4_body: Review = you approve each job before sending (recommended). Full Auto sends without stopping.
help.tour5_body: Click Start to search LinkedIn jobs. Use Stop when done.
help.tour5_example: Spend 15–30 min daily: Start → review jobs → Approve or Skip.
help.tour6_body: When a job appears here, read the cover letter, edit if needed, then Approve & Apply.
help.tour6_example: Job: Data Analyst — read letter, tweak a sentence, approve.
help.tour6_demo_letter: Hello, I have experience in data analysis and Python. I would love to contribute to your team...
help.tour7_body: All submitted or skipped applications appear here. Export CSV for tracking.
help.tour7_example: Filter by status: Applied, Skipped, Error.
help.tour8_body: Add job titles you're looking for. The app uses these in LinkedIn search.
help.tour8_example: E.g. Software Engineer, Data Analyst, Product Manager.
help.tip_apply_mode: Review: you approve each application. Full Auto: sends without stopping. Watch: shows jobs without applying.
help.tip_languages: App language changes the UI. Spoken languages go on your resume. Search languages expand jobs in PT, EN, and ES.
help.tip_start_bot: Start begins LinkedIn job search. Use Stop when done. In Review mode, each job pauses for your approval.
